finding_results.notes: Tiana states her changed understanding once, then the rest of the back half converts it into conduct: she questions Marcia about the nursing letter, draws a sharper boundary with Delroy, withholds Devon's name during dinner, and stores both discoveries instead of weaponizing them.

finding_results.evidence: chapters/chapter_13.md:37; chapters/chapter_13.md:41; chapters/chapter_13.md:45; chapters/chapter_13.md:51; chapters/chapter_13.md:55; chapters/chapter_13.md:59; chapters/chapter_13.md:63; chapters/chapter_13.md:69; chapters/chapter_13.md:73; chapters/chapter_13.md:85
finding_results.notes: The office scene now keeps the two-track process, the $540 fee and waiver stakes, and the originals warning while replacing part of the checklist drift with pressure: Miss Gumbs confronts Tiana about undocumented household income and strips Delroy's failed promise of narrative shelter.

summary: Chapter 13 now drives the immigration-office opener through confrontation rather than repeated procedural listing, and the trunk discoveries reshape the back half through altered questions, boundaries, and withheld disclosures instead of repeated explanatory narration.
